sys_script.name: Enforce Linear Audit Lifecycle

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_8b450800936c4350b439f04bdd03d62d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>x_1977323_smartlic_license_audit</collection><condition/><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition table="x_1977323_smartlic_license_audit">review_statusCHANGESTOpending_review^EQ<item display_value="Pending Review" endquery="false" field="review_status" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="CHANGESTO" or="false" value="pending_review"/><item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/></filter_condition><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Enforce Linear Audit Lifecycle</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    // Check if the previous state was either Manually Revoked or Retained
    var oldState = previous.getValue('review_status'); // Replace 'review_status' with your actual backend field name
    
    if (oldState == 'manually_revoked' || oldState == 'retained') { // Replace with your actual choice backend values
        
        // Block the action and alert the manager
        gs.addErrorMessage("Action Denied: You cannot move a finalized audit (Retained or Revoked) back to Pending Review.");
        current.setAbortAction(true);
        
    }

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>Taiba.Eijaz</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-24 10:11:20</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>8b450800936c4350b439f04bdd03d62d</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Enforce Linear Audit Lifecycle</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="SmartLicenseHub" source="x_1977323_smartlic">57b8b93c93184310b439f04bdd03d6b3</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="SmartLicenseHub">57b8b93c93184310b439f04bdd03d6b3</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_8b450800936c4350b439f04bdd03d62d</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>Taiba.Eijaz</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-24 10:11:20</sys_updated_on><template/><when>before</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=8b450800936c4350b439f04bdd03d62d"/></record_update>
